zh.Staffort, Baden, Germany: 巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hanß Jost Stober於大約1639年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特時，他的父親Johann Martin Stober35歲，母親Anna Catherina Wolf40歲。他於大約1664年與Anna Catharina在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特被列為school master。他去世於1691年1月27日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hanß Jost Stober于大约1639年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特时，他的父亲Johann Martin Stober35岁，母亲Anna Catherina Wolf40岁。他于大约1664年与Anna Catharina在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特被列为school master。他去世于1691年1月27日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stober
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Stöber): from Middle High German stöuber ‘hunting dog’, for a hunter or for a curious, restless person.

Germanized form of Sorbian Stobor: from the Old Sorbian personal name Stobor, derived from the imperative stoj ‘stand, stay’ (later interpreted as if derived from sto ‘hundred’) + the element bor ‘to fight’.

variants.name: Stoeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Willi.

variants.name: Stoebner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Darrold, Helmuth.
German (also Stöbner): variant of Stöber (see Stober ). The surname Stoebner or Stöbner is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Stover
meanings: North German (Stöver): from Middle Low German (bad)stover ‘bather, barber, worker at a public bathhouse’, mainly an occupational name, but occasionally perhaps a nickname for a dedicated bather. Compare Stoever .
English: variant of   Stopher   with intervocalic voicing of /f/ to /v/.

nameMeanings.name: Hanß
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval back-formation from Hankin, which is composed of Han (a short form of Jehan John ) + the Middle English diminutive suffix -kin. However, the suffix was mistaken for the Anglo-Norman diminutive -in, hence the form Hank. Hank is now sometimes used as an independent given name in North America, where it is usually taken as a pet form of Henry . It has more or less died out in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Jost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Jodocus, Latinized form of the Breton name Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, altered under the influence of the biblical name Job.

en.lifeSummary: When Hanß Jost Stober was born about 1639, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, his father, Johann Martin Stober, was 35 and his mother, Anna Catherina Wolf, was 40. He married Anna Catharina about 1664, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. His occupation is listed as school master in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. He died on 27 January 1691, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hanß Jost Stober est né environ 1639, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, son père, Johann Martin Stober, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anna Catherina Wolf, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Anna Catharina environ 1664, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est school master à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1691, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

Er starb am 27. Januar 1691 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hanß Jost Stober è nato il circa 1639 nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, il suo padre, Johann Martin Stober, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Anna Catherina Wolf, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Anna Catharina circa 1664, nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come school master nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Morì il 27 gennaio 1691, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hanß Jost Stoberが約1639年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートで生まれた時，父Johann Martin Stoberは35歳，母Anna Catherina Wolfは40歳であった。約1664年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでAnna Catharinaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでの職業はschool masterと記録されている。彼は1691年1月27日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hanß Jost Stober(이)가 대략 1639년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Martin Stober(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Catherina Wolf(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1664년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Anna Catharina(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 school master이었다. 그는 1691년 1월 27일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hanß Jost Stober nasceu aproximadamente 1639, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, seu pai, Johann Martin Stober, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anna Catherina Wolf, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Catharina aproximadamente 1664, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como school master em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1691, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hanß Jost Stober родился около 1639 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, его отцу по имени Johann Martin Stober было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Catherina Wolf, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Catharina около 1664 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей.  Он работал по профессии school master в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. Он умер 27 января 1691 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

Se casó con Anna Catharina aproximadamente 1664, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era school master en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Murió el 27 de enero de 1691, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
